title: dianthus hispidus
intro: Dianthus hispidus, also known as frilly pink grass pink or fringed pink, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Dianthus hispidus can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
